message: mex scaffold created and populated (Claude + Codex configs; CLAUDE.md symlinks to AGENTS.md). Master is on Django 3.1.1 — migration chain PRs #354-#360 pending.
Default branch renamed master -> main on GitHub (protection rules, open PRs auto-migrated). Workflow triggers, badges, docs and mex context updated to match.

Wayfinder map #362 charted for the test-wall effort: planning-only map on plio-backend; integration tests defined as backend API-journey tests (real Django + tenant Postgres + Redis, no browser); 8 tickets (#363-#370), e2e stack decision blocked by survey, per-PR Django-chain validation blocked by stack decision; coverage must be visible per layer with a rising floor.

Wayfinder ticket #363 (journey inventory) resolved: 9 e2e journeys happy-path only (auth 2, creator 4, learner 2, workspace-switch 1); integration covers all surfaces deep incl. exhaustive tenancy/permission matrix; OTP/websockets/admin integration-only; unmerged features (images-in-options #346) excluded until on main. Canonical inventory lives on the issue.

Wayfinder ticket #364 (e2e stack survey) resolved: five parallel research lenses (general, auth, player/iframe, ecosystem/cost, local audit) independently converge on Playwright; Cypress runner-up, TestCafe/BrowserStack revival rejected. Evidence in docs/research/e2e-stack-survey.md. Stack decision #369 now unblocked.

E2E stack decision resolved (#369): Playwright ratified; BrowserStack dropped; all 9 journeys sharded per PR with @quarantine hatch; real YouTube playback pending spike #371; one test account (#372); reusable workflow in frontend + thin backend caller; ephemeral in-workflow CI stack; local-first (one command per layer) binding on all workstreams; rewrite not port; tests/e2e/journeys/ layout. #370 unblocked.

Integration suite architecture resolved (#367): pytest + pytest-django (3.1-compatible pin, bump at 5.0 step); session-scoped tenant universe (org-a/org-b/personal) with per-test rollback + slow_lane truncate exceptions; real Redis, per-xdist-worker logical DBs, flushdb per test; factory_boy + schema-aware builders; auth journeys mocked at HTTP boundary, authed_client fixture elsewhere; tests/integration/ by inventory axis, plain pytest no BDD; <=5min CI budget with evidence-based demotion.

YouTube playback spike resolved (#371): real playback on GHA runners hard-blocked by YouTube datacenter-IP bot wall (0/20, error 150); identical harness plays fine on residential IP. Embed loading works in CI. Recommended: playback-stubbed journeys in CI + @real-playback local lane (pending ratification). Evidence: docs/research/yt-playback-spike.md
Playback amendment ratified: e2e playback-dependent journeys run stubbed in CI; @real-playback tag = local-only lane (GHA excluded). Addendum recorded on #369.

Unit-gap plan decided (#366): surface-based coverage bar (line-% blind to Django's declarative code — Codecov showed 97.66% with whole apps untested); experiments+tags consciously skipped (abandoned in prod); CRUD/permission surfaces delegated to the integration matrix; four per-app fill issues (plio queries.py+masking+CSV, entries carryover recursion, users filters+role visibility, etl CRUD+perms) written pytest-style on shared factories, gated only on the integration harness slice. Also surfaced: Codecov uploads dead since Jan 2024 (noted on #368).

Coverage & ratchet decided (#368): enforcement in-repo (committed floor file + CI fail-under — Codecov had died silently in both repos, so enforcement can't live on an external service), Codecov revived visibility-only (v5+token, fail_ci_if_error). Backend: scoped .coveragerc + branch coverage, unit/integration as separate flags+floors (honest baseline reset off inflated 97.66%). e2e: journey-manifest coverage, not line-%. One global floor per lane (4 total). Ratchet: manual bump in test-adding PRs + job-summary nudge, floors ~1% under measured. Token provisioning: task #373 (Deepansh).

Jest revival decided (#365): pin jest-mock-axios to exact 4.5.0 (4.6.1+ imports @jest/globals at top level — fatal under jest 26; caret range froze poisoned 4.7.3 when the lockfile was first committed Jul 2024), permanent mixpanel-browser mock (CI unit tests had been initializing real analytics via injected secret; mock drops the secret and unblocks secret-free local runs), prism-es6 transformIgnorePatterns exception. Local experiment: 34/38 suites, 372/389 tests green; 17 drifted tests enumerated for test-by-test fixes. No toolchain upgrade — Vue build-tooling ruled out of map scope. Map fog is now empty.

Per-PR validation runbook decided (#370): sequential rebase (one step per merge, conflicts owned by their step, mis-based 5.0 PR re-stacked onto 4.2); chain PR checks = pre-commit + unit + integration on the branch + e2e caller (PR backend × main frontend); go/no-go binary on all-green + floors held with no-new-quarantine rule, deprecations as radar; fix-forward with per-test justifications, pre-existing bugs spin out; merge per step with 24-48h staging soak, production checkpoints 3.2 → 4.2 → 5.2 LTS, real-playback lane at start/post-5.0/pre-release. Map decision phase complete — 9/9 decision tickets resolved.

E2E test account provisioned & verified (#372): plio.e2e.user@gmail.com; refresh token minted via OAuth Playground against the existing client (project plio-298804 — number 865363153324 matches the client-id prefix; Plio Production has no OAuth clients); verified refresh-grant → userinfo → local convert-token → Plio API token; GOOGLE_OAUTH2_* trio set on plio-frontend (old BrowserStack-era client id/secret copies had been purged — re-added). Re-mint procedure documented on the ticket. Token also transited Discord — rotation recommended, procedure takes ~5 min.

Codecov tokens provisioned (#373): CODECOV_TOKEN set as Actions secret on both plio repos (per-repo tokens). All 11 children of wayfinder map #362 are now closed — map awaits only the synthesis session (Decisions-so-far → Ralph-ready workstream decision issues → close map).

Synthesis session: wayfinder map #362 closed. Decisions-so-far folded into 7 Ralph-ready workstream issues across 4 workstreams — #374 integration suite (keystone; harness slice gates the fills; backend coverage wiring folded in per #368), #375-#378 per-app unit fills (blocked-by #374 via native GitHub dependencies), #379 jest revival + frontend coverage (repo: plio-frontend), #380 Playwright e2e + journey manifest (repo: plio-frontend + backend caller). No standalone coverage issue — #368 explicitly folds into each workstream. Runbook #370 stays maintainer process, not a Ralph run. Execution: ralph.sh --issue N; #374 and #379 can start in parallel.

Added root CONTEXT.md (domain glossary: content/tenancy/auth/learner-runtime/test-wall terms) — required by Ralph's context gate before any pipeline step; format follows .ralph CONTEXT-FORMAT (language/relationships/dialogue/ambiguities)
#381 uses pytest for both legacy unit tests and tenant-aware integration tests; Redis DBs and pytest databases are isolated per xdist worker.
Review #381: test settings must clear SMS_DRIVER before importing base settings, and OAuth session seeding is limited to integration-only collections to preserve unchanged legacy tests.

PR 390 hardened via 14-round codex review loop (33 findings fixed, round 14 clean): mutation-proven blind spots closed across tenancy routing, cache invalidation, soft-delete cascades, OTP guarantees, per-plio SQL predicates; harness hygiene (Redis DB0 reserved, MEDIA_ROOT+dump cleanup, floor ratchet now enforced vs base branch in CI, pre-commit action replaced with direct run on py3.10). Pattern: run codex review loops on Ralph PRs before human review.
